aimath.title: AI Math Tutor
aimath.shortDescription: Application that helps students solve math using AI with step-by-step explanations. Uses React, OpenAI API, and MathML for formula display.
aimath.detailedDescription: This project was initiated during the Spring 2026 semester. The goal is to create a personalized learning support tool that helps students not only know the answer but also clearly understand the solution method. The system uses the GPT-4 model to analyze problems and generate detailed solution steps.

author.mockGoal: Building accessible educational tools for everyone.
